notes: Central file for the hfact discharge (Silverman III.8.2): it isolates PicDualDivisorClass as the single carried projective-model residual of III.6.1b, then builds the full factorisation phi^*(g_T) = c*(g_{phi-hat T}*[ell]^*k) on top of it. No sorry, no set_option maxHeartbeats. The _local suffix on pullbackDivisor_kappaDivisor_local exists purely to avoid a name clash with PairingNondeg when both files are imported by SeparableScaling.
